content: propose_joint_activity(activity_name="Library Visit", message="Hey Alex, I was thinking about heading to the library this week. Would you like to go together? I could use some company and a change of scenery.", proposal="I'd like to visit the library and read some books. It would be great to have some company and a change of scenery.", invited_persons=["Alex Medina"], time="Y2020-W01-activity-D3", location="Library")

contact(message="Hey Alex, I was wondering if you'd be interested in grabbing a coffee this week? I could use some good conversation and a change of scenery. Let me know if that works for you.", to="Alex Medina")

propose_joint_activity(activity_name="Library Book Club", message="Hey everyone, I was thinking about starting a small book club at the library. I've been reading a lot lately and would love to discuss some of these books with you. Would you be interested in joining?", proposal="I'd like to start a small book club at the library. I've been reading a lot lately and would love to discuss some of these books with you.
